plugins.name: nav
plugins.description: Keep any codebase navigable as it grows — audit (assess + feasibility), refactor (verbatim move + test gates), headers (file-top descriptions), map (bilingual codebase HTML), doctor (full health pass). Language-agnostic. Built on Ousterhout's deep-module principles.

plugins.name: shape
plugins.description: Give intent its form before building — converge on what to build via real, disposable instances (mockups), not descriptions. Sibling to nav. Early: one skill (mockup).
